title: DesignSystem
description: the realized, versioned token + asset artifact that makes a Brand's identity tangible — W3C-DTCG tokens, WCAG colour pairs, distinctive-asset files. The downstream realization of a Brand.

valid_from.description: business-truth window start — when this fact became true in the world; null = since-forever

valid_to.description: business-truth window end — when this fact stopped being true; null = still valid

confidence.description: reliability score for this instance; 1.0 = certain, 0 = no confidence

name.description: the design system's name, e.g. 'Honest UDLS'

state.description: mirrors PD Design — a DesignSystem is a designed artifact a solution Design conforms to

items.description: THE chain edge — the Brands whose voice/values/positioning/visual-identity this system makes tangible; required, minItems 1. A DesignSystem with no Brand to realize is the dangling-ref defect L3 forbids.

tokens.description: W3C DTCG token tree inline OR a string URI to a DTCG token file — URI by default, inline permitted

wcag_pairs_verified.description: deterministic gate result: every Tier-2 colour pairing meets the target ratio

items.description: URIs to logo/wordmark FILES — the realized form of Brand.distinctive_assets prose

version.description: the system's own published SemVer version — distinct from the bitemporal valid_from/to and the lifecycle state: the three-axis lifecycle
